title: Wawa stop — Mama coffee, kids snacks
prompt: Mid-shot inside @wawa-interior in front of the colorful snack-and-drink wall (rows of refrigerated cases with bright drink bottles and snack bags). EXACTLY TWO CHILDREN in frame — no other people anywhere, no adults, no third child. @Sara on the LEFT FOREGROUND, brown ponytail, pointing up at a fruit-cup label on the cooler. @Eva on the RIGHT FOREGROUND, curly blonde with rainbow bow, pointing at a tall purple shake bottle in the cooler at her eye level. The two kids are clearly the only people in the frame. NO Mama in frame, NO Papa in frame, NO third child, NO phantom kid. Sara (pointing at a fruit cup): "Mango cup!" Eva (pointing at the shake, wiggling): "Bluebery shake!" Sara (correcting, gentle): "It's BLUE-berry, silly." Eva (already not listening, fixated on the shake): "Mmmmm." From off-camera, an unseen Mama's voice: "Get whatever you want, adventurers — long drive ahead."
